GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETUP PAGEREF _Toc160096289 \h 3 1.1. Enablement System Code PAGEREF _Toc160096290 \h 3 2. Add additional custom codes. PAGEREF _Toc160096291 \h 5 2.1. C-000-EX33 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc160096292 \h 5 3. Add Transaction Parameters EX33 Enablement PAGEREF _Toc160096293 \h 6 3.1. RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction PAGEREF _Toc160096294 \h 6 3.2. RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Parameters PAGEREF _Toc160096295 \h 7 4. Add Task Action for Active Picking Task Types PAGEREF _Toc160096296 \h 13 4.1. Task Action Configuration for task Types PAGEREF _Toc160096297 \h 13 5. Add User Profile Configuration for Max Tote Number Assignment PAGEREF _Toc160096298 \h 14 5.1. User Profile Configuration UI PAGEREF _Toc160096299 \h 14 6. Task Creation Rules PAGEREF _Toc160096300 \h 15 6.1. Change oLPN Task creation Picking Task Parameters PAGEREF _Toc160096301 \h 15 6.2. Change oLPN Task Creation Definition PAGEREF _Toc160096302 \h 15 GLOBAL EXTENSION CONTROL CODE SETU P Enablement System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI. If system code C-000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add. Populate the following information: 232410 174433 Note: The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save. Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed. right 353276 0 0 Click ADD. Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen. System Code parameters Screen is displayed. Click ADD button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided above. Click SAVE. Click on the Parameters tab . 189290 417782 C heck the box to enable all custom functionality. Click SAVE. Add additional custom codes. 138023 631981 Navigate to System Codes UI in WM. We will need to add Custom code C- 000- EX33 if it has not been added. Search for system code C - 000 : Use the Custom Code drop-down option under th e Record Type menu. Type in 000 for Code Type. Click apply to search. Click the Checkbox to select the system code. Click on the Code ID's action button in the lower right of the menu. Click ADD action button. Populate the fields with the information provided in the screenshot above . Click SAVE. C-000-EX33 Enablement Click the Blue Parameters Tab. Located next to the DETAILS tab. Check the box to enable all custom functionality. CLICK SAVE. Add Transaction Parameters EX33 Enablement RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Navigate to transactions parameters UI, filter for P ackPickCart * Select P a ck Pick Cart transaction and select copy to copy transaction. Copy transaction configuration as seen below. Save. RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Parameters Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for previously created transaction name. Configure transaction parameters assumed in EX33 extension spec under assumptions section . Note: For local testing purposes label printing was disabled. Note: Parm 22-23 needs to have the following configured in sys code . Click on “EX33 Pack Pick Cart” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Add configuration parameters for 517-517, 518-518, 519-519 and 520-520. Hit “Save”. Hit “ Save ” Hit "Save”. Note: Description name is EX33 Zone Picking – Pick and Pass Hit “ Save ” Hit “ Save ” Confirm P a ck Pick Cart transactions have newly created parameters. Select Edit, check parameters, and save . Please complete configuration for all pack pick cart transactions that require EX33. Add Task Action for Active Picking Task Types Task Action Conf iguration for task Types Navigate to Task Action UI. Select “ Add ” Add below task action for INT50 Task Picking Group Hit “Save”. Repeat process for all task types using custom EX33 RF picking for active transaction. Add User Profile Configuration for Max Tote Number Assignment User Profile Configuration UI Open User Profile Configuration UI Search Username Select User Select ‘Edit’ Configure EX-33 Max Num of oLPNs: For testing purposes, value was set to 3. Repeat configurations for all users. Task Creation Rules Change oLPN Task creation Picking Task Parameters Open Task Creations Rules UI Select into Wave Task Criteria Select Rules names that will utilize RF Picking to Active Select Picking Task Parameters Tab Enable ‘Pick to tote?’ Select Pick Cart Plan: Pick Cart Plan – 3 totes . Select ‘Save Configuration’ Repeat for all task creation rules that will utilize EX33 RF Picking for Active. Change oLPN Task Creation Definition Open Task Creations Rules UI Select into Wave Task Criteria Select Rules names that will utilize RF Picking to Active Select Definition Tab Select ‘AID oLPN Number’ Configure Value to 1 . Select ‘Save’. Repeat Process for all task criteria that will utilize RF Picking for Active.

Add Transaction Parameters EX33 Enablement RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Navigate to transactions parameters UI, filter for P ackPickCart * Select P a ck Pick Cart transaction and select copy to copy transaction. Copy transaction configuration as seen below. Save. RF Pack Pick Cart Transaction Parameters Open Transaction Parameters UI, search for previously created transaction name. Configure transaction parameters assumed in EX33 extension spec under assumptions section . Note: For local testing purposes label printing was disabled. Note: Parm 22-23 needs to have the following configured in sys code . Click on “EX33 Pack Pick Cart” transaction and click on “Program Template” on the bottom right. Click “Add” Enter in the following information so it looks like the image below. Hit “Save” Add configuration parameters for 517-517, 518-518, 519-519 and 520-520. Hit “Save”. Hit “ Save ” Hit "Save”. Note: Description name is EX33 Zone Picking – Pick and Pass Hit “ Save ” Hit “ Save ” Confirm P a ck Pick Cart transactions have newly created parameters. Select Edit, check parameters, and save . Please complete configuration for all pack pick cart transactions that require EX33. Add Task Action for Active Picking Task Types Task Action Conf iguration for task Types Navigate to Task Action UI. Select “ Add ” Add below task action for INT50 Task Picking Group Hit “Save”. Repeat process for all task types using custom EX33 RF picking for active transaction. Add User Profile Configuration for Max Tote Number Assignment User Profile Configuration UI Open User Profile Configuration UI Search Username Select User Select ‘Edit’ Configure EX-33 Max Num of oLPNs: For testing purposes, value was set to 3. Repeat configurations for all users. Task Creation Rules Change oLPN Task creation Picking Task Parameters Open Task Creations Rules UI Select into Wave Task Criteria Select Rules names that will utilize RF Picking to Active Select Picking Task Parameters Tab Enable ‘Pick to tote?’ Select Pick Cart Plan: Pick Cart Plan – 3 totes . Select ‘Save Configuration’ Repeat for all task creation rules that will utilize EX33 RF Picking for Active. Change oLPN Task Creation Definition Open Task Creations Rules UI Select into Wave Task Criteria Select Rules names that will utilize RF Picking to Active Select Definition Tab Select ‘AID oLPN Number’ Configure Value to 1 . Select ‘Save’. Repeat Process for all task criteria that will utilize RF Picking for Active.
